scripts.validate:css: npx clean-css-cli public/assets/css/index.css -o /dev/null && npx clean-css-cli public/assets/css/motion.css -o /dev/null && npx clean-css-cli public/assets/css/parrot-fx.css -o /dev/null
scripts.validate:js: npx terser public/assets/js/site.js -o /dev/null --compress --mangle && npx terser public/assets/js/index.js -o /dev/null --compress --mangle && npx terser public/assets/js/parrot-fx.js -o /dev/null --compress --mangle
scripts.validate: npm run validate:css && npm run validate:js
